sessions_sample.raw: You’ll spend plenty of time in the lower zones, building your endurance base; you’ll also spend some time climbing hills, finding different gears with pick-ups and intervals, and practicing your race pace so that you’re ready to thrive on race day.
sessions_sample.parsing_note: Session details are not structured; lacks specific day, type, and distance.

sessions_sample.raw: Most weeks in this program have two strength circuits, two rest days, and one day for cross-training.
sessions_sample.parsing_note: General description of weekly structure, not a specific session.

sessions_sample.raw: BIGGEST week of TRAINING 6 hours, 35 minutes (includes five runs + 2 strength circuits)
sessions_sample.parsing_note: Not a specific session; general information about training volume.

sessions_sample.raw: LONGEST long run DISTANCES 2 hours, 30 minutes
sessions_sample.parsing_note: Not a specific session; general information about longest run.

unhandled_patterns.issue: Duration is presented as a total for the week rather than a specific session.
unhandled_patterns.suggested_rule: Recognize total weekly training durations and categorize them appropriately.

unhandled_patterns.pattern: two strength circuits, two rest days, and one day for cross-training
unhandled_patterns.issue: General weekly structure is described without specific session details.
unhandled_patterns.suggested_rule: Identify and extract general weekly structure descriptions and convert them into session formats.

prompt_improvements: Add a rule to identify and extract general weekly structure descriptions and convert them into session formats.
Recognize total weekly training durations and categorize them appropriately.
anomalies: The plan lacks specific day-by-day session details, making it difficult to parse individual training sessions.
